policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-kv-02 - Microsoft Entra ID authentication and Azure RBAC for Data Plane'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Key+Vault#IncidentremediationKeyVault#drcp-kv-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP KeyVault Disabled RBAC permission model
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the creation of a key vault that does not have the RBAC permission model enabled.

drcp.name: KeyVaultEnableRBACAuthorizationDisabled
drcp.controlDesc: Microsoft Entra ID authentication and Azure RBAC for Data Plane

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
